items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for real-time usage display.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the real-time usage display feature, specifically the message indicating remaining hours. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this functionality. The prior step evidence focuses on booking confirmations and member interactions without demonstrating the tracking of time usage or the enforcement of the weekly limit, leading to an inconclusive verdict.
